title: BATTERY HARRIS EAST - Updated June 2026 - 21 Photos - Parks

title: The Battery - What to See in Lower Manhattan | The Battery
content: + Statue of Liberty / Ellis Island. # The Battery. ### Statue of Liberty. Visit two of the world’s most recognized New York landmarks—the Statue of Liberty and Ellis Island—on a ferry from The Battery, the birthplace of New York City. # Visit The Battery. Breathtaking harbor views, vast perennial gardens, bike paths, grand lawns, an urban farm, and the *fintastic* SeaGlass carousel. * ### Discover the history of The Battery through an interactive timeline. ### Come visit us and see the largest public perennial garden in the country and the only one with Lady Liberty in the background. Learn more on The Battery Blog. Read about the ceremony on our blog. * ### The Secret History of The Battery Trees. Learn about our amazing trees on The Battery Blog. Learn about the park’s rich history, many important landmarks and monuments, Seaglass Carousel, beautiful perennial gardens designed by renowned Dutch garden designer Piet Oudolf and so much more!
